meaning: Radio Service Set ID,无线服务集标识
examples: Wireless networks to provide software modifications SSID, channel and password functions.
Access points periodically broadcast a Service Set Identifier (SSID) that identifies one WLAN network from another.
Note that for some of these feeds, you need the spreadsheet id (ssid) or worksheet id (wsid) to formulate the feed URL.
Also, there's no way to access a wireless network with a hidden SSID, although WPA is supported.
Using the wireless network manager utility on your device, search for "Push2TV" wireless network name (SSID) and connect.
